releases.label: COSMOS2020
releases.summary: CLASSIC and FARMER catalogs: ~1.7M sources over the 2 deg² COSMOS field with photometry in 30+ bands and LePhare + EAZY photometric redshifts; supersedes COSMOS2015.

releases.label: COSMOS2015
releases.summary: Previous-generation catalog: ~1.2M sources with 30-band photo-z (Laigle et al. 2016).
